sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 7

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section IX, List of Answers on Topics 7:1
items.html: (to the question) Before it rises as MAN [Mayin Nukvin] to receive Mochin of Gadlut, the lower one must be complete in ten Sefirot — that is, its fallen AHP [Awzen, Hotem, Peh] must have returned to it. Therefore it first needs the illumination of Mochin of VAK [Vav Ktzavot, the six ends], which lower the Hey Tachtona [lower Hey] from its Eynaim [eyes] and return its AHP to it; and afterwards, when it has already been completed in ten Sefirot, it can rise as MAN and receive in them the discernments of the Lights of Gadlut. (p. 788, beginning "And we shall start")
